creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Created attachment 203604
Update to Piwigo 2.9.5

It's been a long time, nearly 9 months, since the last version of Piwigo was released. We are actively working on Piwigo 2.10 but for now, let's get some bug fixed on Piwigo 2.9. We fixed a bug introduced in 2.9.4 on user manager, made Piwigo compatible with PHP 7.3.3, fixed a compatibility issue with Piwigo Remote Sync, updated 17 languages and improved speed on album edition page.

Poudriere buildlog: https://pkg.cainites.net/data/freebsd_12x64-system/latest-per-pkg/piwigo-2.9.5.log
